rationale: The Iran ceasefire narrative and market surge offer marginal relief on energy costs for Romania, while the Russia-Ukraine war near Romania's border continues without new escalation.

top_events.title: Trump halts Iran strikes, claims deal near; markets surge
top_events.summary: Global stock markets surged on Trump's Iran deal claim; for Romania this means modest relief on energy import costs and financial market stability, though unconfirmed.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war / Black Sea security
top_events.summary: War continues near Romania's border with no new escalation this cycle; background security concern persists.

top_events.title: Powerful earthquake in southern Philippines
top_events.summary: 37 dead; geographically distant, no direct relevance to Romania.
